expectations.text: States that Phase 8 implementation task issues are always executed by subagents
Runs ready non-overlapping tasks A and B in parallel implementation subagents
Runs sequential task C through its own implementation subagent rather than directly in the primary context
Explains that the primary agent orchestrates dependency order, reviews subagent changes or tests, and records GitHub task comments
expectations.evidence: missing: orchestration, dependency order, github task comments
